name: Spicy Fruit Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Brown sugar or Maple syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt and spices.
2. Stir in apple, brown sugar and nuts. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, juice and butter. Stir into apple mixture just until blended. Fold in bran flakes. Pour batter into oiled muffin pans, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes. Makes 12 muffins.
